name: Merk's Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1) Cream the shortening, granulated sugar, and vanilla thoroughly. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
2) Sift together flour, baking powder, and baking soda. Add to the creamed mixture alternately with sour cream, blending after each addition.
3) Grease a 10-inch tube pan and line the bottom with wax paper. Pour half of the batter into the pan.
4) Mix the butter with brown sugar and cinnamon. Add nuts and toss. Place half of the nut mixture over the first layer of batter. Spread with the remaining cake batter and top with the remaining nut mixture.
5) Bake at 350 degrees until the cake springs back when touched lightly, about 30 to 40 minutes. Makes 8 servings.
Each serving contains about: 661 calories; 191 mg. sodium; 116 mg. cholesterol; 38 grams fat; 73 grams carbohydrates; 9 grams protein; 0.24 gram fiber
